text: The Sales Comparison Approach was developed by identifying, researching, and analyzing recent sales of comparable small-scale neighborhood retail properties in the Bloomington market. Selected sales reflect arm’s-length transactions and were adjusted for differences in factors such as access, age, size, condition, construction quality, and location. The adjusted sale prices provided a range of indications of value for the subject property. After reconciliation, this approach yielded a credible value indicator aligned with what buyers are currently paying for similar retail assets within the local market.
